title: Add WaveletWeightedWidenet submission directory with README and metadata
body:
- Adds `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-20_Wavelet_Weighted_Widenet` submission directory
- README documenting the WWW architecture: 12-layer ternary MLP transformer with VQ compression (~1 bit/param), achieving val_bpb=1.1719
- submission.json with competition metadata
- Training log and script copy
